levels.name: IRON GATE
levels.defeat_tip: Ferrets attack in bursts — queue your fastest card first to win the speed race.
levels.clear_desc: The ferrets were relentless, but you held your ground. Their speed taught you the most important lesson on this path — move first, or don't move at all.

levels.name: BAMBOO TRAIL
levels.desc: Ferrets and rabbits hold the trail.
levels.defeat_tip: The bear hits hard on slow turns. Fill all your slots and strike before it acts.
levels.clear_desc: The trail is yours. The bear's raw power was real, but a coordinated strike landed first. You are beginning to understand the weight of momentum.

levels.name: FOX DEN
levels.desc: Ferrets, rabbits, and an otter block the path.
levels.defeat_tip: The otter builds tags over time. Prioritize it early before its buffs stack.
levels.clear_desc: Three against one — and you still walked out. The otter nearly had you, but you read the field before the tags stacked. That awareness will carry you far.

levels.name: SILENT SHRINE
levels.desc: Rest at the shrine of the old blade masters.
levels.defeat_tip: Focus your queue — spreading damage across all enemies rarely pays off here.
levels.clear_desc: The shrine stands quiet. The blade masters ask nothing of you — only that you are still standing. Rest here. The path ahead will not be gentle.

levels.name: OTTER TEST
levels.desc: The Otters Will Teach you a new ability only if you defeat them
levels.defeat_tip: The turtle uses phase shifts — watch for the stance change and adjust your target.
levels.clear_desc: The otters bowed only after you bested them on their own terms. In defeat they offered what no training could — the secret of water: strike where the armor is not.
